context: Evaluates the IngestionService chunking logic. Verifies that chunk_size and chunk_overlap parameters are respected, that short texts produce a single chunk, and that process_raw_scrape returns the correct chunk count.

checklist.name: chunk_size respected
checklist.description: _chunk_text() produces chunks where each chunk's length is at most chunk_size characters.

checklist.name: chunk_overlap applied
checklist.description: Adjacent chunks share exactly chunk_overlap characters of content at the boundary.

checklist.name: Short text single chunk
checklist.description: Text shorter than chunk_size produces exactly one chunk containing the full original text.

checklist.name: process_raw_scrape returns count
checklist.description: process_raw_scrape(scrape_id) returns the integer number of chunks created after processing.

checklist.name: Constructor defaults
checklist.description: IngestionService initialises with default chunk_size=1000 and chunk_overlap=200 when those arguments are omitted.
